answers.answer: Re-use os_mod.rs dispatch functions. The posix module should delegate to os_mod implementations since CPython os wraps posix. No duplicated logic.
Populate posix.environ as a dict from std::env::vars() at registration time, matching CPython behavior.
Follow the os_mod pattern (from_func dispatch with MbValue args) for consistency, not the newer extern C ABI from builtins_mod.
Use libc::uname on Unix targets with cfg gate. Return a 5-element tuple of strings matching CPython uname_result(sysname, nodename, release, version, machine).
